# Tables

## Basic Table

| Header 1 | Header 2 | Header 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Cell 1   | Cell 2   | Cell 3   |
| Cell 4   | Cell 5   | Cell 6   |

## Alignment

| Left-aligned | Center-aligned | Right-aligned |
|:-------------|:--------------:|--------------:|
| Left         | Center         | Right         |
| Text         | Text           | Text          |
| Longer text  | Longer text    | Longer text   |

## Table with Formatting

| Feature | Syntax | Result |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Bold | `**text**` | **text** |
| Italic | `*text*` | *text* |
| Code | `` `code` `` | `code` |
| Link | `[text](url)` | [text](https://example.com) |
| Strikethrough | `~~text~~` | ~~text~~ |

## Wide Table

| Col 1 | Col 2 | Col 3 | Col 4 | Col 5 | Col 6 | Col 7 | Col 8 | Col 9 | Col 10 |
|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|--------|
| A1 | A2 | A3 | A4 | A5 | A6 | A7 | A8 | A9 | A10 |
| B1 | B2 | B3 | B4 | B5 | B6 | B7 | B8 | B9 | B10 |

## Table with Long Content

| Name | Description | Notes |
|------|-------------|-------|
| Short | Short description | OK |
| Medium length name | This is a medium-length description that spans several words | Some notes here |
| Very Long Name That Might Wrap | This is a very long description that contains a lot of text and might cause the table layout to behave differently depending on how the renderer handles wide content in table cells | These are some rather lengthy notes that accompany the long description |

## Single Column Table

| Items |
|-------|
| One |
| Two |
| Three |

## Single Row Table

| A | B | C | D | E |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 |

## Table with Special Characters

| Symbol | Name | HTML Entity |
|--------|------|-------------|
| & | Ampersand | `&amp;` |
| < | Less than | `&lt;` |
| > | Greater than | `&gt;` |
| " | Double quote | `&quot;` |
| \| | Pipe | `&#124;` |

## Table with Numbers

| Metric | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 | Total |
|--------|---:|---:|---:|---:|------:|
| Revenue | $1,234 | $2,345 | $3,456 | $4,567 | $11,602 |
| Users | 100 | 250 | 500 | 1,000 | 1,850 |
| Growth | 10% | 25% | 50% | 100% | 46.25% |

## Table with CJK Characters

| 項目 | 説明 | 備考 |
|------|------|------|
| 名前 | ユーザー名を入力 | 必須 |
| メール | メールアドレス | 任意 |
| 住所 | 都道府県から入力 | 任意 |
